title: hieracium brachiatum subsp. flagelliflorum
intro: Hieracium brachiatum subsp. flagelliflorum, also known as Hawkweed or Hieracium, is a flowering plant species within the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium brachiatum subsp. flagelliflorum include reducing inflammation, treating wounds and skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Hieracium brachiatum subsp. flagelliflorum can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used topically or taken internally to leverage its medicinal properties.
